SessionStart.prompt: Silently load project context. Read .claude/PROJECT_CONTEXT.md if it exists. Check for any unresolved items in .claude/observers/ALERTS.md. Do NOT output anything to the user — just internalize the context for this session. If PROJECT_CONTEXT.md doesn't exist, that's fine — the user may create it with /begin.

Stop.prompt: Before ending, check: (1) Are there uncommitted changes? Run `git status --short`. (2) Are there unresolved CRITICALs in .claude/observers/QUALITY.md or BLOCKERs in .claude/observers/ARCH.md? If either is true, warn the user: 'You have uncommitted work or unresolved blockers. Run /end before closing.' Otherwise stay silent.
